entry.data:
PARTLY SUNNY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING
MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
HIGHS AROUND 70
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
COOLER WITH LOWS AROUND 40

CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 50
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
